class.name: PlayFabLobby
class.description: Returned by lobby create/join APIs. Getters expose cached snapshots that are refreshed before lobby state-change signals are emitted.

method.name: set_properties_async
method.description: Updates this lobby's [member properties] (visible only to lobby members; hidden from [method PlayFabMultiplayer.find_lobbies_async] results) and returns a completion [Signal]. Owner-only; non-owner callers receive a failure result. Dictionary keys must be [String] or [StringName]. Values must be [String] or [StringName] (or [code]null[/code] to delete that key), and omitted keys are left unchanged.

method.name: set_member_properties_async
method.description: Updates this local member's [member PlayFabLobbyMember.properties] in the lobby and returns a completion [Signal]. Can only edit the local member's entry — see [member PlayFabLobbyConfig.member_properties] for scope details. Dictionary keys must be [String] or [StringName]. Values must be [String] or [StringName] (or [code]null[/code] to delete that key), and omitted keys are left unchanged. On success, the local member snapshot is updated before the completion signal and [code]MEMBER_UPDATED[/code] state change are emitted, even when the native SDK does not raise a separate local-self property callback.

method.name: leave_async
method.description: Leaves this lobby and returns a completion [Signal].

method.name: is_owner
method.description: Returns whether [param user] is the current owner snapshot.

members.member: Lobby string properties (the [member PlayFabLobbyConfig.lobby_properties] bucket). Visible only to lobby members; hidden from [method PlayFabMultiplayer.find_lobbies_async] results.
Search string properties (the [member PlayFabLobbyConfig.search_properties] bucket). Visible to anyone who can discover the lobby. Set at create time only and not editable through this snapshot.

signal.name: state_changed
signal.description: Emitted after the lobby snapshot refreshes.

constants.constant: Lobby session ended for the local user. Fires both when [code]leave_async()[/code] completes and when the SDK observes an unexpected disconnect; the lobby is removed from [PlayFabMultiplayer]'s tracked list before this is emitted.
